items.name_en: Cherry Blossom🌸 Pink🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25B Heavyweight, don't blink😉, small bucket bag, instantly falling in love with the ethereal cream white. Classic diamond quilted stitching + mini double C logo, low-key and luxurious.· Pull the drawstring to instantly become a "🤩🤩 lucky bag", full anti-theft skills.· The chain ⛓️ length can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or slung casually, friendly for petite frames. Instantly photogenic with a Southern France vacation vibe! This one is on the "heirloom" list, sisters waiting for 25B, go for it! The elegance of the diamond quilt, the embellishment of the gold chain, this black handbag is simply too high-end. Large and small pocket design, practical and stylish, paired with gold metal ring details, texture maxed out~ Light luxury style! 4775Size: 12.5×10×7cm

items.name_en: Chestnut Red·
items.name_cn:
Chestnut Red·
LE 37 Bucket Bag Small_
Super cute bucket bag with handle_New style, made of Italian calfskin. The body has a simple, structured silhouette; it looks structured without being too sharp. Features a metal stud at the bottom. Paired with a classic metal logo insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish!
Size: 17×20×13cm
Model: 749036

items.name_en: Chestnut·
items.name_cn:
Chestnut·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A best-seller that took over the entire fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Paris street Rue De Solferino, this bag features original patent Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed 'L' letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag closures. It's simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_en: Cinnabar Wax Leather with Gold Buckle
items.name_cn:
Cinnabar Wax Leather with Gold Buckle
woc Small Envelope Bag. When it comes to envelope bags, this one from Y must be mentioned! Made entirely of Italian lambskin, it features a structured shape and a comfortable touch! The detachable shoulder strap adds versatility; remove it to use as a clutch or evening bag. It has multiple card slots, making it incredibly practical. Carry your phone and cards, and this small bag is all you need for your day out!
Model: 393953
Size: 19x11.5x4cm

items.name_en: Classic and timeless, this Chanel white quilted bag is a fashion favorite. Black and white contrast outlines a refined silhouette, the iconic double-C logo exudes luxury, and paired with a sparkling chain, it's eye-catching whether worn on the shoulder or crossbody. Carry it to effortlessly navigate the city; every step is a focal point. Model 4515. Dimensions 11.5*18.5*11.

items.name_en: Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Handbag
items.name_cn:
Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Handbag
Model 33705
The Hammock Flip handbag interprets a classic style with soft texture and practical function, while continuing the series' signature details. Featuring creative stitching and a flip structure, it easily converts from a shoulder bag to a close-fitting Hobo bag. This version is crafted from classic calfskin.
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
One external zip pocket, two internal slip pockets
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
LOEWE hot-stamped or silver-plated
Dimensions 15-22-21
.
